assignments.description: Builds a delete-ready ContactPointEmail from the current Loop_Split_Emails (PrepopulatedItems) item. Stamps Id onto var_SingleEmail, adds to var_DeleteEmails. Routes back to Loop_Split_Emails.
assignments.name: Assign_Build_Delete_Email
assignments.label: Add Email to Delete List

assignments.description: Builds a new ContactPointEmail record from the current Loop_Split_Emails_New (AddedItems) iteration. Copies screen field values and stamps ParentId onto var_SingleEmail, then adds var_SingleEmail to var_NewEmails. Routes back to Loop_Split_Emails_New to continue iterating.
assignments.name: Assign_Build_New_Email
assignments.label: Build New Email Record

assignments.description: Builds an update-ready ContactPointEmail record from the current Loop_Split_Emails (PrepopulatedItems) iteration. Copies screen field values onto var_SingleEmail (preserving the original Id), then adds var_SingleEmail to var_UpdateEmails. Routes back to Loop_Split_Emails to continue iterating.
assignments.name: Assign_Build_Update_Email
assignments.label: Build Update Email Record

assignments.description: Increments var_PrimaryCount by 1 when Loop_Count_Primary_Emails.field_Email_IsPrimary is true. Routes back to Loop_Count_Primary_Emails.
assignments.name: Assign_Count_Primary_Email
assignments.label: Increment Primary Email Count

assignments.description: Increments var_PrimaryCount by 1 when a newly added email row (from EmailsList.AddedItems) has the Primary checkbox checked. Routes back to Loop_Count_Primary_Emails_Added to continue iterating.
assignments.name: Assign_Count_Primary_Email_Added
assignments.label: Increment Primary Email Count (Added)

assignments.description: Resets var_PrimaryCount to 0 before the email primary-validation loop. Routes to Loop_Count_Primary_Emails.
assignments.name: Assign_Reset_Primary_Count_Email
assignments.label: Reset Primary Count for Email

decisions.description: After deleting emails, routes to clear Account PersonEmail only if the deleted email was primary and this is a Person Account.
decisions.name: Decision_Clear_Email_Account_Field
decisions.label: Primary Email Deleted?

rules.name: Primary_Email_Was_Deleted
rules.label: Primary Email Deleted on Person Account

decisions.description: Checks Loop_Split_Emails.field_Email_MarkedForDeletion. If true, routes to Assign_Build_Delete_Email. If false, routes to Assign_Build_Update_Email.
decisions.name: Decision_Email_Marked_Delete
decisions.label: Email Marked for Deletion?

decisions.description: Evaluates var_PrimaryCount after Loop_Count_Primary_Emails and Loop_Count_Primary_Emails_Added. If greater than 1, routes to Screen_Error_Primary. If zero or one, proceeds to Loop_Split_Emails.
decisions.name: Decision_Email_Primary_Valid
decisions.label: Email Primary Count Valid?

decisions.description: Checks whether var_DeleteEmails contains any records. If yes, routes to Screen_Confirm_Delete_Email. If no, routes to Decision_Has_New_Emails.
decisions.name: Decision_Has_Delete_Emails
decisions.label: Any Emails to Delete?

decisions.description: Checks whether var_NewEmails contains any records after Loop_Split_Emails runs. If not empty, routes to Create_New_Emails. If empty, skips to Decision_Has_Update_Emails.
decisions.name: Decision_Has_New_Emails
decisions.label: Any New Emails to Create?

decisions.description: Checks whether var_UpdateEmails contains any records. If not empty, routes to Update_Emails. If empty, routes to Screen_Success_Email.
decisions.name: Decision_Has_Update_Emails
decisions.label: Any Emails to Update?

decisions.description: Checks whether Loop_Count_Primary_Emails.field_Email_IsPrimary is true. If true, increments var_PrimaryCount via Assign_Count_Primary_Email. If false, loops to next item.
decisions.name: Decision_Is_Email_Primary
decisions.label: Is Email Primary?

decisions.description: Checks field_Email_IsPrimary on current Loop_Count_Primary_Emails_Added item. If true, increments var_PrimaryCount. If false, continues to next item.
decisions.name: Decision_Is_Email_Primary_Added
decisions.label: Is Added Email Primary?

Flow.description: Screen subflow called by SMQS_Screen_Manage_ContactPoints to manage ContactPointEmail records for a given Account. Receives pre-queried email records via var_AllEmails and the Account record via var_Account. Handles add, edit, and delete (with deletion confirmation) with primary validation (max one primary). All DML faults route to Error_Screen.

dynamicChoiceSets.description: Retrieves Invalid_Reason__c picklist values from ContactPointEmail for the Invalid Reason dropdown in Screen_Manage_Emails.
dynamicChoiceSets.name: dcs_InvalidReason_Email

dynamicChoiceSets.description: Retrieves UsageType picklist values from ContactPointEmail for the Usage Type dropdown in Screen_Manage_Emails.
dynamicChoiceSets.name: dcs_UsageType_Email

Flow.label: SMQS Screen Manage ContactPoints Email Subflow

loops.description: Iterates EmailsList.PrepopulatedItems to count how many have IsPrimary = true. Each item routes through Decision_Is_Email_Primary. After all items, routes to Loop_Count_Primary_Emails_Added.
loops.name: Loop_Count_Primary_Emails
loops.label: Count Primary Emails (Existing)

loops.description: Iterates EmailsList.AddedItems to count how many newly added email rows have the Primary checkbox checked, continuing the tally from Loop_Count_Primary_Emails. Each item routes through Decision_Is_Email_Primary_Added. After all added rows, Decision_Email_Primary_Valid evaluates the total count.
loops.name: Loop_Count_Primary_Emails_Added
loops.label: Count Primary Emails (Added)

loops.description: Iterates EmailsList.PrepopulatedItems. Routes each item through Decision_Email_Marked_Delete: if Marked_For_Deletion__c is true, adds to var_DeleteEmails; otherwise builds update record.
loops.name: Loop_Split_Emails
loops.label: Build Update Emails from Existing

loops.description: Iterates EmailsList.AddedItems after primary validation passes. For each added row, Assign_Build_New_Email stamps the screen field values and ParentId onto var_SingleEmail, then adds var_SingleEmail to var_NewEmails. Routes to Decision_Has_Delete_Emails when done.
loops.name: Loop_Split_Emails_New
loops.label: Build New Emails from Added

recordCreates.description: Performs a single DML insert for all records in var_NewEmails. Each record had ParentId stamped in Assign_Build_New_Email. On success, routes to Decision_Has_Update_Emails. On fault, routes to Error_Screen.
recordCreates.name: Create_New_Emails
recordCreates.label: Create New Email Records

recordDeletes.description: Permanently deletes all records in var_DeleteEmails. On success, routes to Decision_Clear_Email_Account_Field. On fault, routes to Error_Screen.
recordDeletes.name: Delete_Emails
recordDeletes.label: Delete Emails

recordUpdates.description: Clears PersonEmail on the Account when the deleted email was primary (Person Accounts only).
recordUpdates.name: Clear_PersonEmail_Field
recordUpdates.label: Clear PersonEmail Field

recordUpdates.description: Performs a single DML update for all records in var_UpdateEmails. On success, routes to Screen_Success_Email. On fault, routes to Error_Screen.
recordUpdates.name: Update_Emails
recordUpdates.label: Update Email Records

screens.description: Shared fault screen displayed when any DML operation fails. Surfaces the triggering record Id and name, the full fault message, and the current flow stage so an administrator can diagnose the failure.
screens.name: Error_Screen
screens.label: Error Screen

fields.name: ErrorMessage
fields.fieldText:
The screen flow "Manage Contact Points" has failed. Please send this message to your administrator.


Triggering record: {!recordId} - {!var_Account.Name}


Fault Message: {!$Flow.FaultMessage}


Current Stage: {!$Flow.CurrentStage}

screens.description: Confirmation screen shown when var_DeleteEmails is not empty. Displays emails to be permanently deleted and emails to be kept. User clicks Confirm Delete to proceed or Go Back to uncheck.
screens.name: Screen_Confirm_Delete_Email
screens.label: Confirm Email Deletion

fields.name: txt_Confirm_Delete_Email_Warning
fields.fieldText: The following emails will be permanently deleted. This cannot be undone. Click "Go Back and Review" to uncheck any that should be kept.

fields.name: txt_Keep_Email_Header
fields.fieldText: Email Addresses that will be kept

screens.description: Displayed when the user marks more than one record as Primary in the repeater. allowBack is true so the user can return and correct. allowFinish is false so the flow cannot complete in this error state.
screens.name: Screen_Error_Primary
screens.label: Primary Validation Error

fields.name: txt_Error_Primary
fields.fieldText:
Only one record can be marked as Primary.


Please go back and update your selections so that no more than one record has Primary checked.

screens.description: Displays all ContactPointEmail records for this Account in a repeater pre-populated from var_AllEmails (sorted primary first). Users can edit existing rows or add new ones. canRemoveItem is false — deletion is handled via the Mark for Deletion checkbox. The repeater writes back via PrepopulatedItems and AddedItems. On Save, primary validation runs before DML.
screens.name: Screen_Manage_Emails
screens.label: Manage Email Addresses

fields.name: txt_Email_Marked_Delete_Above
fields.fieldText: ⚠ This email is marked for deletion.

fields.name: txt_Email_Marked_Delete_Below
fields.fieldText: ⚠ This email is marked for deletion.

screens.description: Confirmation screen displayed after email DML completes successfully. Shows the Account name and tables of created and updated email address records.
screens.name: Screen_Success_Email
screens.label: Email Addresses Updated

fields.name: txt_Success_Email_None
fields.fieldText: No records have been updated or crated.

fields.name: txt_Success_Email_Created
fields.fieldText: Email addresses for {!var_Account.Name} have been created.

fields.name: txt_Success_Email_Update
fields.fieldText: Email addresses for {!var_Account.Name} have been updated.

variables.description: Account Id passed in from the parent flow. Used to stamp ParentId on new ContactPointEmail records.
variables.name: recordId

variables.description: Account record passed in from the parent flow. Used in error screen display ({!var_Account.Name}) and for context.
variables.name: var_Account

variables.description: All ContactPointEmail records for this Account, pre-queried by the parent flow via SMQS_Screen_Manage_ContactPoints_Subflow. Passed in sorted IsPrimary DESC. Used to pre-populate the EmailsList repeater.
variables.name: var_AllEmails

variables.description: Accumulates delete-ready ContactPointEmail records (Id-only) built from EmailsList.PrepopulatedItems marked for deletion during Loop_Split_Emails. Passed to Delete_Emails for a single bulk delete.
variables.name: var_DeleteEmails

variables.description: Set to true when a deleted email had IsPrimary = true. Used to decide whether to clear Account.PersonEmail after deletion.
variables.name: var_HasDeletePrimary

variables.description: Set to true by Assign_Flag_New_Emails when var_NewEmails is not empty. Used by Screen_Success_Email to conditionally show the Created datatable.
variables.name: var_HasNewEmails

variables.description: Set to true by Assign_Flag_Update_Emails when var_UpdateEmails is not empty. Used by Screen_Success_Email to conditionally show the Updated datatable.
variables.name: var_HasUpdateEmails

variables.description: Accumulates new ContactPointEmail records built from EmailsList.AddedItems during Loop_Split_Emails_New. Passed to Create_New_Emails for a single bulk insert.
variables.name: var_NewEmails

variables.description: Counter used by Loop_Count_Primary_Emails and Loop_Count_Primary_Emails_Added to tally how many rows have IsPrimary = true. Reset to 0 by Assign_Reset_Primary_Count_Email before counting. Evaluated by Decision_Email_Primary_Valid.
variables.name: var_PrimaryCount

variables.description: Scratch variable used as a staging record during the build loops. Reused for new and update scenarios — fields are stamped and then the record is added to var_NewEmails or var_UpdateEmails.
variables.name: var_SingleEmail

variables.description: Accumulates update-ready ContactPointEmail records built from EmailsList.PrepopulatedItems (not marked for deletion) during Loop_Split_Emails. Passed to Update_Emails for a single bulk update.
variables.name: var_UpdateEmails
